title: Managerial Accounting: Which of the following is NOT a characteristic of managerial...
summary: Identify which attribute is not characteristic of managerial accounting, such as GAAP adherence.
prompt: Which of the following is NOT a characteristic of managerial accounting?

options.text: Managerial accounting does not adhere to GAAP

solution: Managerial accounting does not adhere to GAAP, as it is primarily designed for internal users and does not require the same level of standardization as financial accounting (Page 9).
